parameters.query: INSERT INTO scrape_log (job_name, status) VALUES ('competitor_synthesis', 'running') RETURNING id;
SELECT id, name, ticker, exchange, news_page_url FROM companies WHERE is_target = FALSE AND news_page_url IS NOT NULL ORDER BY name;

values.cssSelector: h1 a, h2 a, h3 a, .entry-title a, .post-title a, .news-title a, .article-title a
h1 a, h2 a, h3 a, .entry-title a, .post-title a, .news-title a, .article-title a

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO articles (company_id, source_url, title, published_date, source_site)
VALUES ({{$json.company_id}}, '{{$json.source_url}}', '{{$json.title}}', {{$json.published_date ? "'" + $json.published_date + "'" : "NULL"}}, '{{$json.source_site}}')
ON CONFLICT (source_url) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, title, company_id;

values.content: You are an expert mining industry analyst. Analyze competitor news for First Canadian Graphite (FCI) leadership. Classify each company's sentiment as BREAKTHROUGH, FAILURE, or STEADY with a score from -1.0 to 1.0.

parameters.query: UPDATE scrape_log SET status='completed', articles_found={{$('Merge Results').first().json.total_count}}, articles_new={{$('Merge Results').first().json.new_count}}, completed_at=NOW() WHERE id={{$('Log Start').first().json.id}};
UPDATE scrape_log SET status='completed_no_new', articles_found={{$('Merge Results').first().json.total_count}}, articles_new=0, completed_at=NOW() WHERE id={{$('Log Start').first().json.id}};
